title: begonia × lancangensis
intro: Begonia × lancangensis, also known as Lancang Begonia, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, providing relief from pain, inflammation, and other symptoms. In traditional medicine, Begonia × lancangensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion to treat various ailments, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments.
